summary: Validated requested professional-module refactor via static review + runtime smoke. TypeScript and web export pass, but runtime is blocked pre-auth by missing Supabase env causing app crash before screen rendering.

critical.issue: Backend API layer could not be tested: repository does not contain /app/backend service/tests for this iteration despite testing_type=both.

ui_bugs.issue: Web preview fails before authentication with uncaught runtime error 'supabaseUrl is required', blocking validation of BarberDashboardExperience runtime flows.
Interactive date/time Pressables in reschedule modal lack testID attributes, reducing testability and violating required test-id coverage for key interactive controls.

integration_issues.flow: Professional dashboard end-to-end (agenda, quick booking modal, conflict prevention persistence)
integration_issues.issue: Could not execute authenticated runtime validations due to missing EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in environment; app crashes during createClient initialization.

action_items: Provide EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in runtime environment so app can boot and authenticated professional-flow testing can proceed.
Optionally guard/create Supabase client lazily or behind env validation to avoid hard crash at app startup when env is missing in preview environments.
Add missing testID attributes to reschedule modal date/time controls for deterministic UI automation.
After env fix, rerun full professional flow validation (free slot -> modal -> service/day/time selection with haptics -> create booking -> conflict prevention/persistence).
critical_code_review_comments: Positive: requested visual/UX refactor elements are present in code (metrics cards subtle border+diffuse shadow, iOS-like segmented control, minimal free-slot timeline, 4-column time grid, dynamic primary color + readable foreground helper, haptics on day/service/time and success notification on booking).
Critical runtime blocker is not in dashboard logic itself; it is eager Supabase client initialization with empty env values in /src/services/supabase.ts.
Reschedule modal is partially outside testability standard because interactive controls are missing testIDs.
test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md; no QA accounts available. Also required Supabase env keys are absent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Build health is good (yarn tsc --noEmit and yarn expo export --platform web both pass). Runtime web boot on localhost:3000 currently crashes with 'supabaseUrl is required' before auth screen/dashboard can load. Start next cycle by fixing env provisioning, then execute UI e2e against barber-dashboard selectors.
rca of the issue: Repro: run `yarn expo start --web --port 3000` and open app -> Expo error overlay shows 'supabaseUrl is required' at src/services/supabase.ts:12 (createClient). Root cause: EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL/ANON_KEY missing and supabase client created eagerly with empty strings. Mitigation: provide env in preview and/or add safe lazy initialization/guard to prevent startup crash when env unavailable.
